dataset: p1a-e2e-catalog (image->image leave-one-out, grouped by canonical category)
notes: Category-clustering record for the former P1-A perception encoder. Generated by ml/eval (evaluate_retrieval -> EvalReport) with relevance defined by equality of canonical category labels. These metrics support category-level image clustering only; they do not establish lift for live text search, personalization, outfit recommendations, or conversion. Clears the current encoder gate (mrr >= 0.50). Raw run: ml/data/e2e/reports/retrieval_marqo-fashionSigLIP-v1.json.
